title: Revenue and Customs Brief 6 (2025): VAT deduction on insurance intermediary services supplied outside the UK
body: "This brief explains a change in the right to input tax deduction for insurance intermediary services supplied outside the UK before 31 December 2023, following the First Tier Tribunal decision in Hastings Insurance Services Ltd (2025) UKFTT 275 (TC), released on 3 March 2025. "
